system.description: This retractable telescope is a legendary instrument of sorcerers and natural philosophers alike. In the hands of a mundane researcher, it will truthfully uncover the secrets of any natural phenomenon viewed through its lenses: the duration of an incoming storm, the size of a meteor that is going to impact, the true composition of stars, and the like. Anyone with Artifice or Sorcery 3 can use the Spyglass to gaze into the future. The Spyglass will tell them how to bring about one specific event that they wish to happen within one year: the downfall of a king, how an army will lose a battle, where to find a powerful magic item, etc. The event must be within the realm of possibility. The Sorcerer still must carry out the actions that are required to bring about the event.
